meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't deploy apps (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't deploy apps. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills: Deploy Your AI Apps Like a Pro
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployments. Master Claude Code skills and Antigravity to ship your AI projects faster. A complete guide for student developers.
content.answer_block: Deployment failure usually stems from environment misconfiguration or missing build steps. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you automate infrastructure scaffolding and dependency management. This workflow validates your environment in real-time, ensuring your code is production-ready before you ever hit the deploy button on your first SaaS project.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks perfecting your logic, tweaking the UI, and watching your console logs fill with success messages. But the moment you attempt to push to production, the dream hits a wall. Silent crashes, CORS errors, and environment variable mismatches turn your hard work into a graveyard of abandoned repositories. It is the quintessential 'Student Developer's Trap'—the gap between code that runs on a laptop and code that lives on the internet.

Today, we bridge that gap. We are shifting your workflow from manual, error-prone deployments to an automated, AI-assisted pipeline. By leveraging Claude Code to interpret your infrastructure needs and Antigravity to scaffold your deployment architecture, you will stop fighting the server and start focusing on your product. This is how you move from a student building prototypes to an engineer shipping production-grade software.

steps.title: Environment Audit
steps.description: Before deploying, you must ensure your local environment matches your production target. Use Claude Code to identify hidden dependencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and identify all missing production-level environment variables and build-time dependencies.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'audit dependencies for production deployment'

steps.title: Automated Dockerfile Generation
steps.description: Stop writing Dockerfiles by hand. Let AI generate a hardened container configuration specific to your stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready, multi-stage Dockerfile for this Node.js/Python application that optimizes build size and security.

steps.title: CI/CD Pipeline Blueprint
steps.description: Establish a robust pipeline that tests your code automatically on every push.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs unit tests, performs a build check, and notifies me on failure.

steps.title: Infrastructure as Code (IaC) Setup
steps.description: Define your cloud resources in code to ensure consistency across dev, staging, and production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Terraform script to provision the necessary cloud infrastructure for this specific application architecture.

steps.title: Deployment Verification
steps.description: Perform a final dry-run to ensure all deployment steps trigger correctly without manual intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Simulate a deployment sequence and identify potential failure points in the networking or permission layers.

pro_tips: Always use .env.example files to track required variables; never commit real secrets to your repository.
Implement health-check endpoints in your app so your deployment provider knows exactly when the service is live.
Use a staging environment that mirrors production; never deploy directly to your primary instance.
Enable automated rollback triggers in your CI/CD pipeline to revert to the last stable build on error.
Monitor your deployment logs in real-time using Claude Code to catch initialization errors before they impact users.
content.next_steps: Once your deployment pipeline is live, focus on setting up monitoring and logging tools like Sentry or Datadog to track your application's performance in the wild.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student writing scripts; you are an engineer shipping solutions to the world. The barrier between you and your first successful SaaS launch has been dismantled. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
